subject: URGENT - Entire platform down for all 50 users
body: CRITICAL: Our entire team of 50 people cannot access the platform at all...
issue_summary: The entire platform is inaccessible for a 50-person team, causing severe business disruption with a major client demo imminent.
root_cause: A system-wide outage is affecting all users, likely due to a server failure, database crash, or infrastructure issue.
suggested_action: Immediately escalate to the on-call engineering team, check server status and logs, and provide the customer with a status update and ETA within 15 minutes.

draft_reply.subject: Re: URGENT - Entire platform down for all 50 users [CRITICAL - Immediate Action]
draft_reply.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

I want to assure you that this is our absolute top priority right now. I completely understand the severity of this situation — a platform outage affecting your entire team with a client demo in 90 minutes is unacceptable, and I sincerely apologize for the disruption this is causing.

Here is what we are doing right now:
1. Your ticket has been escalated to our senior engineering team as a P0 (highest priority) incident.
2. Our on-call engineers are investigating the root cause as of this moment.
3. We are targeting full restoration within the next 30-45 minutes.

I will personally send you a status update every 15 minutes until the platform is fully restored. If the situation persists beyond 30 minutes, we will arrange an emergency bridge call with our technical team.

Again, I am deeply sorry for this impact. We take full responsibility and will ensure this is resolved as quickly as humanly possible.

Best regards,
Support Team

subject: Account suspended without any warning or notice
body: My account was suspended without any prior notice or explanation...
issue_summary: The customer's account was suspended without notice, blocking access to 3 years of critical business data.
root_cause: The account suspension may be due to an automated policy trigger (e.g., payment failure, suspicious activity detection) or an administrative error.
suggested_action: Immediately review the account suspension reason in the admin panel, contact the customer with a full explanation, and restore access if the suspension was erroneous.

draft_reply.subject: Re: Account suspended without any warning or notice [URGENT - Account Restored]
draft_reply.body:
Dear Customer,

I sincerely apologize for the distress this has caused. Having your account suspended without warning — especially with years of critical data at stake — is completely unacceptable, and I understand your frustration.

I have escalated your case to our Account Recovery team as a critical priority. Here is what happens next:
1. Our team will review your account status within the next 30 minutes.
2. You will receive a full explanation of why the suspension was triggered.
3. If this was an error on our part, your account will be restored immediately.

You will hear back from us within 1 hour with a full resolution or clear next steps. Your data is safe and has not been deleted.

Thank you for your patience.

Best regards,
Senior Support Team

subject: Overcharged on my monthly bill
body: I was charged $299 this month but my subscription is $99/month...
issue_summary: The customer was overcharged $200 on their monthly bill, causing a bank overdraft and additional fees.
root_cause: A billing system error likely applied a wrong plan or failed to apply a discount, resulting in a 3x overcharge.
suggested_action: Verify the customer's subscription plan in the billing system, issue a $200 refund immediately, and investigate the billing error to prevent recurrence.

subject: Cannot login to my account
body: I have been unable to login for the past 2 hours...
issue_summary: The customer cannot log in despite multiple password resets, with an urgent deadline approaching.
root_cause: Possible causes include a cached session conflict, account lock-out from too many failed attempts, or an authentication service issue.
suggested_action: Manually clear the customer's active sessions, unlock the account if locked, and verify the authentication service status.

subject: Dashboard very slow on Firefox browser
body: The main dashboard takes about 10 to 15 seconds to load when using Firefox...
issue_summary: Dashboard load time is 10-15 seconds on Firefox 126.0, while other browsers are unaffected.
root_cause: A browser-specific compatibility issue, possibly related to a JavaScript API or CSS feature that Firefox handles differently.
suggested_action: Reproduce the issue internally on Firefox 126.0, check browser console for errors, and create a bug report for the frontend team.

subject: Wrong company name on invoice for tax purposes
body: The invoice I received last month shows the wrong company name...
issue_summary: An invoice contains an incorrect company name ('Acme Corp Ltd' vs 'Acme Corporation'), blocking tax documentation.
root_cause: The company name was likely entered incorrectly during account setup or a recent profile update was not reflected in the billing system.
suggested_action: Update the billing profile with the correct legal company name and reissue the corrected invoice.

subject: Profile picture not updating after upload
body: I uploaded a new profile picture 3 days ago but it still shows my old one...
issue_summary: Profile picture upload appears successful but the old image persists after 3 days.
root_cause: A CDN caching issue or a bug in the image processing pipeline is preventing the new image from being served.
suggested_action: Trigger a cache invalidation for the user's profile image and verify the upload pipeline processes new images correctly.

subject: How do I export reports to Excel?
body: I would like to know the steps to export my monthly reports to Excel format...
issue_summary: Customer is asking how to export reports to Excel and whether scheduled exports are possible.
root_cause: User is unfamiliar with the export feature — this is a documentation or discoverability issue rather than a technical problem.
suggested_action: Reply with step-by-step export instructions and link to the relevant help center article. Check if scheduled export is a supported feature.
